nasb.text: And if he sins against you seven times a day, and returns to you seven times, saying, ‘I repent,’ forgive him.”

esv.text: and if he sins against you seven times in the day, and turns to you seven times, saying, ‘I repent,’ you must forgive him.”

cnv.text: 如果他一天七次得罪你，又七次回轉，對你說：‘我懊悔了！’你總要饒恕他。”

ccb.text: 就算他一天得罪你七次，每次都对你说，‘我悔改’，你都要饶恕他。”

csbs.text: 如果他一天七次对你犯了罪，又七次回转过来，对你说：‘我悔改！’你要饶恕他。”
